name: oh-my-zz
description: A focused engineering skill pack for one-question-at-a-time idea grilling and refinement, specification-and-plan bundles, explicit main-agent plan review, brief change plans, secure session handoffs, bounded contract-driven review-and-fix, opt-in project-memory discovery, proposal-first architecture synchronization, pre-merge review decisions, and simplification.
author: laze44

interface.shortDescription: Ten focused workflows for grilled ideas, plans, reviews, project memory, and simplification.
interface.longDescription: A ten-skill engineering workflow pack for grilling and refining ideas, creating specification-and-plan bundles, explicitly reviewing plans in the main agent, planning brief changes, handing off sessions, reviewing and repairing completed implementations, maintaining project memory, reviewing merge readiness, and simplifying code.
